# GLM-5.2 Lightweight Installer

Universal single-click installer for running GLM-5.2 Max (753B MoE) via Cloud-Hybrid or compressed Local Quantized configurations using `llama.cpp`.

## Model Technical Specifications (GLM-5.2 Max)

- **Developer:** Z.AI (Zhipu AI)
- **Model Class:** Flagship Foundation Model (Generational Leap)
- **Architecture:** Mixture of Experts (MoE)
- **Total Parameters:** 753 Billion (753B)
- **Active Parameters:** 40 Billion (40B) per token during inference
- **Context Window:** 1,000,000 tokens (1M)
- **Max Output Tokens:** 128,000 tokens (128K)
- **Modalities:** Text-to-Text
- **License:** MIT (Open Weights)

## Core Capabilities & Agentic Features

- **Multi-Mode Thinking:** Native reasoning engine / Chain-of-Thought (CoT). Supports adjustable `reasoningEffort` parameter (including `max` mode) via cloud API.
- **Context Caching:** Server-side token reuse optimization to accelerate multi-turn long-context interactions.
- **Project-Level Codebase Takeover:** Specialized for full-repository processing (NL2Repo workflow), cross-file dependency mapping, and long-context architecture retention.
- **Auto-Debugging Loop:** Autonomous execution, log reading, tool integration, and programmatic error rollback.
- **Structured Outputs:** Native Function Calling and guaranteed valid JSON generation.
- **Integrations:** Out-of-the-box compatibility with Claude Code and OpenClaw agent frameworks.

## Installer Execution Modes

### 1. Cloud-Hybrid Mode
- **Execution:** UI runs locally; model inference is executed on hosted infrastructure.
- **Model Version:** Full GLM-5.2 Max (753B total / 40B active).
- **Features Enabled:** Full 1M context, Context Caching, maximum `reasoningEffort`.
- **Pricing:** Free via installer infrastructure (subject to dynamic hourly rate limits).

### 2. Local Quantized Mode
- **Execution:** 100% offline local inference via custom-built `llama.cpp` engine.
- **Model Version:** Substantially compressed, quantized, and distilled GGUF variant of GLM-5.2.
- **Data Privacy:** Local execution; zero data retention or data transmission.
- **Limits:** No prompt quotas or throughput constraints.

## System & Hardware Requirements

### Cloud-Hybrid Mode
- **OS:** Windows / Linux / macOS
- **Hardware:** Mid-range modern PC
- **Network:** Stable high-speed internet connection required

### Local Quantized Mode
- **RAM:** 16 GB to 32 GB system memory minimum
- **GPU (Strictly Mandatory):** High-end / upper-mid-range discrete GPU with high VRAM capacity.
  - *Recommended:* NVIDIA RTX 3080 / 4070 or AMD RX 6800 / 7800 and above.
- **Incompatible Hardware:** Integrated graphics (iGPU) and entry-level legacy GPUs are not supported.
